information.name: Pablo
information.quote: 𝗗𝗿𝗶𝘃𝗲𝗻 𝗯𝘆 𝘁𝗵𝗲 𝗰𝗵𝗮𝗹𝗹𝗲𝗻𝗴𝗲 𝗼𝗳 𝗹𝗮𝗿𝗴𝗲-𝘀𝗰𝗮𝗹𝗲 𝗺𝗼𝗱𝗲𝗹𝘀, 𝗮𝗶𝗺𝗶𝗻𝗴 𝘁𝗼 𝗽𝘂𝘀𝗵 𝘁𝗵𝗲 𝗯𝗼𝘂𝗻𝗱𝗮𝗿𝗶𝗲𝘀 𝗼𝗳 𝗰𝗼𝗺𝗽𝘂𝘁𝗮𝘁𝗶𝗼𝗻𝗮𝗹 𝗲𝗳𝗳𝗶𝗰𝗶𝗲𝗻𝗰𝘆. 𝗙𝗼𝗰𝘂𝘀𝗲𝗱 𝗼𝗻 𝘁𝗿𝗮𝗻𝘀𝗹𝗮𝘁𝗶𝗻𝗴 𝘁𝗵𝗲𝗼𝗿𝗲𝘁𝗶𝗰𝗮𝗹 𝗮𝗱𝘃𝗮𝗻𝗰𝗲𝗺𝗲𝗻𝘁𝘀 𝗶𝗻𝘁𝗼 𝗽𝗿𝗮𝗰𝘁𝗶𝗰𝗮𝗹, 𝗶𝗺𝗽𝗮𝗰𝘁𝗳𝘂𝗹 𝘀𝗼𝗹𝘂𝘁𝗶𝗼𝗻𝘀.

workExperience.name: Korea Advanced Institute of Science & Technology (KAIST)
workExperience.description: Focused on early-stage research in PIM-based AI accelerators for optimizing large-scale model inference, particularly for LLMs. Conducted comprehensive paper reviews, comparative analyses, reproduced experimental results, and developed new research proposals to address identified gaps.

workExperience.name: Ecole Polytechnique Fédérale de Lausanne (EPFL)
workExperience.position:
Research Intern, 
Robust Scalable Systems Software Laboratory

project.name: FlightRadar
project.description: Flight Radar with Java UI | @ CS108 project

project.name: Scala-Doc
project.description: "GDOC" style online word processor implemented in Scala | @ CS 214 EPFL

project.name: ImgFS
project.description: Image-based file system inspired by Facebook's Haystack architecture, implemented in C for efficient storage and retrieval.

project.name: Research Internship at KAIST Concurrent & Parallelism Laboratory
project.description: Research Topic: PIM-based AI Accelerator and Software Stack for Efficient LLM Inference

education.name: Ecole Polytechnique Fédérale de Lausanne (EPFL)
education.description: B.S. in Computer Science with a strong emphasis on Communication Systems and Machine Learning.
